hook_options: The Royal Pop is a design icon. But it’s not a wristwatch.
You love the Royal Pop. But it wasn’t made for your wrist.
The Royal Pop belongs in your pocket. Until now.
pieces.recommended_hook: The Royal Pop is a design icon. But it’s not a wristwatch.

beats.line: The Royal Pop is a design icon.
Precision-engineered to turn your Royal Pop
40.35mm inner socket for a perfect fit.
0.7mm retaining lip to keep it secure.
FKM rubber for durability and grip.
Reversible. Non-invasive. Built for daily wear.
Eight colourways to match your style.
The Royal Pop, reimagined for the wrist.
Join the waitlist to be first in line.

caption_options.label: A
caption_options.caption: The Royal Pop was never meant for the wrist—until now. Introducing the Cradle Adapter V1: a precision-engineered conversion kit that turns your Royal Pop into a wristwatch without compromising its design. Reversible, non-invasive, and built for daily wear. Limited first batch. Join the waitlist via link in bio.

caption_options.label: B
caption_options.caption: A pocket watch. A wristwatch. The Cradle Adapter V1 bridges the gap. Engineered with a 40.35mm inner socket, 0.7mm retaining lip, and FKM rubber for durability. Reversible, non-invasive, and available in 8 colourways. First batch is limited. Join the waitlist now.

pieces.cta: Join the waitlist to be first in line for the Cradle Adapter V1. Link in bio.
pieces.handoff_note_for_qa: Recommended caption A aligns more closely with the primary angle's core message ('The Royal Pop was never meant for the wrist—until now') and reinforces the reversible, non-invasive design upfront. It also subtly introduces scarcity with 'Limited first batch,' which may drive urgency without hype.

_meta.primary_angle_title: The Royal Pop was never meant for the wrist — until now
